about.title: About Me
about.description1: A frontend developer by training, I’ve built my expertise around React, Next.js, and Tailwind, with a real sensitivity for design, UX, and pixel-perfect detail. My journey has led me to collaborate with demanding tech teams, like at Uptoo where we were 10 developers on complex projects. Curious, organized, and attentive, I love turning mockups into smooth experiences, always keeping business goals, performance, and SEO in mind. I move forward methodically, never losing my taste for clean code and a job well done.
about.description2: Outside of code, I’m passionate about sports: running, trail running, soccer, and basically anything that pushes me to excel. I love simplicity, moments shared with friends or family, and daily discoveries. I now live in Valencia (Spain), where I find balance between work, sunshine, sports, and social life — a precious source of inspiration in everything I create.
